articles.title: Another one: Ariane 6 flies with four boosters once more - European Space Agency
articles.description: Updated on 30 April 2026On 30 April 2026, four P120C boosters ignited and lifted Ariane 6 to the skies, for the second time. Flight VA268 took 32 satellites for Amazon’s Leo constellation to low-Earth orbit. Liftoff occurred at 05:57 local time (09:57 BST/10:…
articles.content:
